'''Asanté Vos''' was a female [[Kiffar/Legends|Kiffar]], and cousin to [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]].

==Biography==
She was part of the plot to wipe the memories of Quinlan Vos and his [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]]. To this end she personally stunned Aayla, and along with [[Pol Secura]] fed the two captives [[glitteryll]]. Asanté hoped that her part in this plot would give her the money and opportunities necessary to become something other than a [[Kiffu Guardians|Kiffu Guardian]]. Asanté met with Quinlan on [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] as he searched for his Padawan, and once again betrayed him. She was preparing to shoot Quinlan when she was killed by a [[Energy spider|spice spider]].
